titleStmt.title: SII 26.355: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 355. (A.R. No. 336 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of a sum of 20 Paḻaṅkāśu for a nandā lamp to the same temple of the same Kūvam occurring in No. 354 above, by Kachchikkaḍambaṉ Taḻuvakkuḻaindāṉ-uyyavandāṉ alias Śembiyaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Paḻaiyaṉūr in Paḻaiyaṉūr-nāḍu in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam. It is stated that the amount was accepted by a number of Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple (names given) who had agreed to burn the lamp perpetually from the month of Chittirai of the year quoted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉuṭaittākat tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śiri kulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattuk kūvamāṉa tiyākacamuttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviṟ kolamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku
Ikkoṭṭattup paḻaiyaṉūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūr kaccikkaṭampaṉ taḻuvakkuḻaintāṉ Uyyavantāṉāṉa cempiyaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ pakkal Ikkoyiṟ civappirāmaṇaṉ kauśikaṉ ceṉṉeṟpeṟṟāṉ mahādevabhaṭṭaṉum gauvutamaṉ Uṭaiyap piḷḷaiyāṉa tavarājarājabhaṭṭaṉun tampimārum gautamaṉ comatevabhaṭṭa
ṉum tampimārum gautamaṉ tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭaṉum kāśyapaṉ tevarāṉa poṟkoyil nampiyun tampimārum Ivvāṇṭai cittirai māsamutal Iṉṉāyaṉārkkut tirunantāviḷakku Erikka nāṅkaḷ kaikoṇṭa kācu Irupatu Ippaḻaṅ kācu Irupatukkum Oru tirunantāviḷakku ApoRead— ho •rāt
tiram cantirātittavaṟ Erippatākap poliyūṭṭuk kaikkoṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikkivai kaucikaṉ ceṉṉeṟpeṟṟāṉ mahādevabhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai gautamaṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṉa tavarājarājabhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai gautamaṉ tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai gautamaṉ śomadevabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kāśyapaṉ tevarāṉa poṟkoyil nampi Eḻuttu Itu cimāheśvara rakṣai .§§
Digital edition of SII 26.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
